mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NOTICES WHERE DELETED_AT IS NULL

SELECT noticeId , title , createdAt FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn , NOTICE_ID AS noticeId , TITLE AS title , CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM ( SELECT NOTICE_ID , TITLE , CREATED_AT FROM NOTICES WHERE DELETED_AT IS NULL ORDER BY NOTICE_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM < #{endRow} ) WHERE rn >= #{startRow}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_NOTICE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO NOTICES(NOTICE_ID, TITLE, CONTENT) VALUES(#{noticeId}, #{title}, #{content})
INSERT INTO NOTICE_FILES(NOTICE_FILE_ID, ORIGINAL_NAME, STORED_NAME, STORAGE_PATH, NOTICE_ID) VALUES(SEQ_NOTICE_FILE.NEXTVAL, #{originalName}, #{storedName}, #{storagePath}, #{noticeId})
mapper.select: SELECT NOTICE_ID AS noticeId , TITLE AS title , CONTENT AS content , CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM NOTICES WHERE DELETED_AT IS NULL AND NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId}

SELECT NOTICE_FILE_ID AS noticeFileId , ORIGINAL_NAME AS originalName , STORED_NAME AS storedName , STORAGE_PATH AS storagePath , NOTICE_ID AS noticeId FROM NOTICE_FILES WHERE DELETED_AT IS NULL AND NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId}

SELECT NOTICE_FILE_ID AS noticeFileId , ORIGINAL_NAME AS originalName , STORED_NAME AS storedName , STORAGE_PATH AS storagePath , NOTICE_ID AS noticeId FROM NOTICE_FILES WHERE DELETED_AT IS NULL AND NOTICE_FILE_ID = #{noticeFileId}
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTICE_FILES SET DELETED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE DELETED_AT IS NULL AND NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId}
